zh.lifeSummary: 當Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr於1642年10月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托時，他的父親Nathan Fiske27歲，母親Susannah Browne25歲。他於1665年4月26日與Elizabeth Fry在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1665年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特。他於1693年登記服兵役。他去世於1694年10月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年51歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr于1642年10月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托时，他的父亲Nathan Fiske27岁，母亲Susannah Browne25岁。他于1665年4月26日与Elizabeth Fry在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1665年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特。他于1693年登记服兵役。他去世于1694年10月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年51岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Nathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘he (God) has given’ in Hebrew (  compare  Nathaniel  ). This was the name of a prophet who had the courage to reproach  King David  for arranging the death in battle of Uriah the Hittite in order to get possession of the latter's wife Bathsheba (2 Samuel 12:1–15). It was also the name of one of David's own sons. In modern times this name has often been taken as a short form of   Nathaniel   or of   Jonathan .  Since the 1990s it has been much favoured throughout the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Nathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘he (God) has given’ in Hebrew (  compare  Nathaniel  ). This was the name of a prophet who had the courage to reproach  King David  for arranging the death in battle of Uriah the Hittite in order to get possession of the latter's wife Bathsheba (2 Samuel 12:1–15). It was also the name of one of David's own sons. In modern times this name has often been taken as a short form of   Nathaniel   or of   Jonathan .  Since the 1990s it has been much favoured throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr was born on 17 October 1642, in Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Nathan Fiske, was 27 and his mother, Susannah Browne, was 25. He married Elizabeth Fry on 26 April 1665, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1665. He registered for military service in 1693. He died on 11 October 1694, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 51, and was buried in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr est né le 17 octobre 1642, à Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Nathan Fiske, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Susannah Browne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Fry le 26 avril 1665, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1665. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1693. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1694, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr am 17. Oktober 1642 in Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nathan Fiske 27 und seine Mutter Susannah Browne 25. Er hat am 26. April 1665 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Fry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1665 hat er in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er hat sich 1693 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1694 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr è nato il il 17 ottobre 1642 nel Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Nathan Fiske, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Susannah Browne, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Fry il 26 aprile 1665, nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1665. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1693. Morì il 11 ottobre 1694, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lt. Nathan Fiske Jrが1642年10月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーワテルトウンで生まれた時，父Nathan Fiskeは27歳，母Susannah Browneは25歳であった。1665年4月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターでElizabeth Fryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1665年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターに住んでいた。彼は1693年に兵役登録をした。彼は1694年10月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで51歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンオルド ブリイング プレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr(이)가 1642년 10월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathan Fiske(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Susannah Browne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1665년 4월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 Elizabeth Fry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1665년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 살았다. 그는 1693년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1694년 10월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr nasceu em 17 de outubro de 1642, em Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Nathan Fiske, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Susannah Browne, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Fry em 26 de abril de 1665, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1665. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1693. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1694, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr родился 17 октября 1642 г. в местности вэитиртоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Nathan Fiske было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Susannah Browne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fry 26 апреля 1665 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1665 году. В 1693 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 октября 1694 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности олд буринг плеис, вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr nació el 17 de octubre de 1642, en Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Nathan Fiske, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Susannah Browne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Fry el 26 de abril de 1665, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1665. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1693. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1694, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
